basics.name: Yongyi Wang
basics.summary: Ph.D. student in Computer Science at Washington University in St. Louis.

teaching.course: COMS W4115 Programming Languages and Translators
teaching.institution: Columbia University, Department of Computer Science
teaching.description: Supported a 40-student upper-level programming languages and compilers course; held office hours and graded programming assignments, exams, and final language-implementation projects.

teaching.institution: Harvey Mudd College, Department of Computer Science
teaching.description: Served as senior TA; held three weekly office hours, evaluated homework and exams, and assisted other TAs with course-support questions.

teaching.institution: Harvey Mudd College, Department of Computer Science
teaching.description: Supported lab sessions, weekly student meetings, and homework help for introductory programming and theoretical computer science topics.
